companyDescription: Mid-size freight broker (~800 employees) connecting shippers and carriers across North America. Public via SPAC in 2023.
knownPainPoints: Margin compression from spot-market rate volatility
Manual carrier-onboarding bottlenecks the sales team
Two legacy TMS platforms still in use side-by-side post-acquisition
recentNews: Q1 earnings call mentioned tech consolidation as a top priority
Hired new VP of Revenue Operations from a competitor

companyDescription: Series B biotech specializing in single-cell sequencing workflows. ~120 employees, lab in Cambridge MA.
knownPainPoints: Wet-lab and dry-lab data live in disconnected systems
Slow turnaround on analysis pipelines blocks experiment velocity
Compliance burden growing as they prep for clinical work
recentNews: $60M Series B led by Foresight Ventures
Just announced partnership with a major academic medical center

companyDescription: Boutique private-equity firm, ~50 employees, AUM ~$2B. Focus on mid-market industrials.
knownPainPoints: Heavy regulatory reporting overhead consumes ops bandwidth
Portfolio-company performance data is fragmented across spreadsheets
Security posture must satisfy LP due-diligence reviews
recentNews: Hired their first Chief Compliance Officer last quarter

companyDescription: Local artisan bakery co-op with three retail locations and a small wholesale operation.
knownPainPoints: Owner-operators wear too many hats
Manual ingredient ordering occasionally causes stockouts
recentNews: Featured in a regional 'best of' food guide

companyDescription: Industrial robotics integrator. Late-stage startup (~200 employees) deploying robotic cells into auto-tier-1 suppliers.
knownPainPoints: Project-tracking visibility across deployments is poor
Service technicians need offline-capable mobile tooling
Pre-sales engineering effort doesn't scale with pipeline growth
recentNews: Signed a multi-year master agreement with a major OEM
Recently completed SOC 2 Type II audit

companyDescription: Public K-12 school district serving ~14,000 students across 22 schools.
knownPainPoints: Tight, grant-dependent budgets
Long procurement cycles that span board approvals
recentNews: Federal Title I funding renewal pending

companyDescription: Renewable-energy developer focused on commercial solar + battery storage. ~400 employees, US-wide.
knownPainPoints: Three legacy systems for asset tracking, finance, and field service must be reconciled monthly
Inconsistent project handoffs between dev, EPC, and asset-management teams
Pressure to support tax-credit reporting under the latest IRA rules
recentNews: Hired a new CTO from a major utility 6 months ago

companyDescription: Direct-to-consumer apparel brand. Small team, single Shopify storefront.
knownPainPoints: Limited budget for new tooling
One-person ops team

companyDescription: Regional multi-specialty healthcare provider operating 18 outpatient clinics across two states.
knownPainPoints: Documentation burden contributes to clinician burnout
Patient-data interoperability across clinic groups is uneven
Strict HIPAA and state-level compliance requirements
recentNews: Issued an RFP for a new clinical workflow platform
Recently joined a regional health information exchange

companyDescription: Outdoor-gear e-commerce retailer with a growing private-label line. ~80 employees, single fulfillment center.
knownPainPoints: Current e-commerce platform doesn't scale during seasonal peaks
Inventory forecasting is mostly manual
Customer-service team drowns in repetitive order-status questions
recentNews: Hit profitability for the first time last fiscal year
Planning to launch a B2B wholesale channel in 6 months
